name: Costco Anywhere Visa Card by Citi
perks: 4% cash back on eligible gas and EV charging worldwide (on first $7,000 per year, then 1%)
3% cash back on restaurants and eligible travel
2% cash back on all Costco and Costco.com purchases
1% cash back on all other purchases
No annual fee beyond Costco membership
Cashback rewarded as an annual Costco Shop Card redeemable in February
drawbacks: Requires a Costco membership (Gold Star: $65/year, Executive: $130/year)
Cash back only paid once a year as a Costco Shop Card, not monthly
4% gas rate capped at $7,000 in purchases per year
Visa only accepted at Costco (no Amex, MC)
Must visit a Costco warehouse to redeem annual cashback
